institution.name: Minnesota West Community and Technical College

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Minnesota West Community and Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Minnesota West Community and Technical College fell 46% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.9k → $6.5k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Minnesota West Community and Technical College fell 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($13.3k → $11.0k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Minnesota West Community and Technical College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (59.7% → 68.1%).
